zh.Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England: 英國英格蘭坎布利其爾坎布利其
zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard de Freville II於1182年出生在英國坎布利其爾坎布利其時，他的父親Richard de Freville I32歲，母親Wife Richard de Freville I23歲。他和Sybil de Cormeilles至少有1個兒子。他去世於1257年在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾坎布利其享年75歲。

zh-hans.Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England: 英国英格兰坎布利其爾坎布利其
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard de Freville II于1182年出生在英国坎布利其爾坎布利其时，他的父亲Richard de Freville I32岁，母亲Wife Richard de Freville I23岁。他和Sybil de Cormeilles至少有1个儿子。他去世于1257年在英国英格兰坎布利其爾坎布利其享年75岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Freville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French (Préville): habitational name from (La) Préville, the name of several places in various parts of France.

variants.name: Previl
meanings: alternatively, perhaps a shortened form of French Préville (see Preville ).
ornamental name composed of French pré ‘meadow’ and a shortened form of ville ‘settlement’ (see Vil ).

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard de Freville II was born in 1182, in Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England, his father, Richard de Freville I, was 32 and his mother, Wife Richard de Freville I, was 23. He had at least 1 son with Sybil de Cormeilles. He died in 1257, in Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard de Freville II est né en 1182, à Canteburge, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard de Freville I, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Wife Richard de Freville I, avait 23 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Sybil de Cormeilles. Il est décédé en 1257, à Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 75 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard de Freville II 1182 in Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard de Freville I 32 und seine Mutter Wife Richard de Freville I 23. Er hatte mit Sybil de Cormeilles mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1257 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Freville II è nato il nel 1182 nel Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England, il suo padre, Richard de Freville I, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Wife Richard de Freville I, aveva 23 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Sybil de Cormeilles. Morì nel 1257, nel Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 75 anni.

ja.Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England: イギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアカンブリッジ
ja.lifeSummary: Richard de Freville IIが1182年にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアカンブリッジで生まれた時，父Richard de Freville Iは32歳，母Wife Richard de Freville Iは23歳であった。彼はSybil de Cormeillesとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1257年にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアカンブリッジで75歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Freville II(이)가 1182년 영국 캄브리지실르 캄브리지에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard de Freville I(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Wife Richard de Freville I(은)는 23세였다. 그는 Sybil de Cormeilles(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1257년 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 캄브리지에서 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Freville II nasceu em 1182, em Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard de Freville I, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Wife Richard de Freville I, tinha 23 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Sybil de Cormeilles. Ele faleceu em 1257, em Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 75 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard de Freville II родился в 1182 г. в местности камбридж, камбриджешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard de Freville I было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Wife Richard de Freville I, 23. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Sybil de Cormeilles. Он умер в 1257 г. в местности камбридж, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 75 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard de Freville II nació en 1182, en Cantebriche, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard de Freville I, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Wife Richard de Freville I, tenía 23 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Sybil de Cormeilles. Murió en 1257, en Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 75 años.
